title: Terms
subtitle: Transparency about how we work
intro: Below you'll find the key terms for tutoring with Stephen's Private Lessons. This is a summary — you'll receive the full contract after your trial lesson.

agreement.title: Tutoring Agreement
agreement.cancellation: Free cancellation up to 24 hours before the lesson

privacy.title: Privacy
privacy.description: We only process data necessary for tutoring: name, contact details, subject and level. For minors, we also store a parent/guardian's details.
privacy.rights: You have the right to access, correct, and delete your data.
privacy.contact: Contact us via the contact form for privacy requests.

pricing.title: Pricing
pricing.description: Rates depend on level, group size, and location. View current rates on our website or request a quote after your trial lesson.
